app.name: Hou.la Print
login.tagline: Automatic printing of your product labels, invoices and packing slips as soon as an order is paid.
login.hint: Sign in to link your shops
workspaces.title: Your shops
printers.title: Printers
printers.config-hint: Each print type triggers automatically when a sale is made (live, marketplace, gachapon). Configure the printer, the format and check the preview for each type.
printers.detect-label.title: Automatically detect the format of the label loaded in the printer
job.product_label.title: Product labels
job.product_label.desc: Printed automatically on every sale. Each item in the order generates a label with the product name, the variant, the price, the customer name and a QR code. Ideal for identifying parcels before shipping.
job.shipping_label.title: Shipping label
job.shipping_label.desc: Printed automatically when the order moves to "Preparing". Contains the customer's address and carrier information. Standard format 100×150 mm (6×4").
job.order_summary.title: Order summary
job.order_summary.desc: Printed automatically as soon as an order is paid. Summarizes all items, prices, the total and the customer information. Printed on a thermal receipt (ESC/POS) or as a PDF depending on the assigned printer.
job.invoice.title: Invoice
job.invoice.desc: Printed automatically according to your configuration (on payment or on preparation). Generated as a PDF with your legal information, the order details and the tax-inclusive amounts. Configure the trigger in your shop settings on Hou.la.
config.preview.hint: Sample data — actual output is identical
config.order_summary.format-value: 80 mm receipt or A4 PDF — depending on the printer
config.invoice.format-value: A4 PDF — printed on a standard printer
config.enable-shop-hint: Enable a shop to configure the format
zpl.scale-hint: 💡 Adjust the scale if the label is cut off at the edges. 90% suits most printers.
history.title: Print history
settings.title: Settings
detect.success.title: Detection successful!
detect.success.body: Your printer contains ${w} × ${h} mm labels. The format has been applied automatically.
detect.success.hint: If this is not the right format, you can change it manually in the list below.
detect.fail.title: Detection failed
detect.fail.default: Unable to detect the label format.
detect.fail.no-label: No label detected. Make sure labels are loaded in the printer.
detect.fail.comm: Unable to communicate with the printer.
detect.fail.hint: You can select the format manually in the list below.
offline.title: ${printer} — offline
offline.spooled: ${count} job${plural} pending — auto resume on reconnection
notif.print-failed.title: Hou.la Print — Error
notif.printer-detected: Printer "${printer}" detected. The PDF test will be available soon.
error.api-unavailable: API unavailable (${url}). Make sure the server is running.
